015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal.ConverterUtils.*;
023
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
027
028/**
029 * The Link object represents a possible design-time link for a response.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * The Link Object represents a possible design-time link for a response. The presence of a link does not guarantee
033 * the caller's ability to successfully invoke it, rather it provides a known relationship and traversal mechanism
034 * between responses and other operations.
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>OpenAPI Specification:</h5>
037 * <p>
038 * The Link Object is composed of the following fields:
039 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
040 *    <li><c>operationRef</c> (string) - A relative or absolute reference to an OAS operation (mutually exclusive with <c>operationId</c>)
041 *    <li><c>operationId</c> (string) - The name of an existing, resolvable OAS operation (mutually exclusive with <c>operationRef</c>)
042 *    <li><c>parameters</c> (map of any) - A map representing parameters to pass to an operation as specified with <c>operationId</c> or identified via <c>operationRef</c>
043 *    <li><c>requestBody</c> (any) - A literal value or expression to use as a request body when calling the target operation
044 *    <li><c>description</c> (string) - A description of the link (CommonMark syntax may be used)
045 *    <li><c>server</c> ({@link Server}) - A server object to be used by the target operation
046 * </ul>
047 *
048 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
049 * <p class='bjava'>
050 *    <jc>// Create a link to another operation</jc>
051 *    Link <jv>link</jv> = <jk>new</jk> Link()
052 *       .setOperationId(<js>"getUserById"</js>)
053 *       .setParameters(
054 *          JsonMap.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"userId"</js>, <js>"$response.body#/id"</js>)
055 *       )
056 *       .setDescription(<js>"The id value returned in the response can be used as userId parameter in GET /users/{userId}"</js>);
057 * </p>
058 *
059 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
060 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://spec.openapis.org/oas/v3.0.0#link-object">OpenAPI Specification &gt; Link Object</a>
061 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/docs/specification/links/">OpenAPI Links</a>
062 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanOpenApi3">juneau-bean-openapi-v3</a>
063 * </ul>
064 */
065@SuppressWarnings({
066   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
067})
068public class Link extends OpenApiElement {
069
070   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
071   private static final String ARG_mimeType = "mimeType";
072   private static final String ARG_parameter = "parameter";
073   private static final String ARG_property = "property";
074
075   // Property name constants
076   private static final String PROP_description = "description";
077   private static final String PROP_operationId = "operationId";
078   private static final String PROP_operationRef = "operationRef";
079   private static final String PROP_parameters = "parameters";
080   private static final String PROP_requestBody = "requestBody";
081   private static final String PROP_server = "server";
082
083   private String operationRef;
084   private String operationId;
085   private String description;
086   private Object requestBody;
087   private Server server;
088   private Map<String,Object> parameters = map();
089
090   /**
091    * Default constructor.
092    */
093   public Link() {}
094
095   /**
096    * Copy constructor.
097    *
098    * @param copyFrom The object to copy.
099    */
100   public Link(Link copyFrom) {
101      super(copyFrom);
102
103      this.operationRef = copyFrom.operationRef;
104      this.description = copyFrom.description;
105      this.operationId = copyFrom.operationId;
106      this.requestBody = copyFrom.requestBody;
107      this.server = copyFrom.server == null ? null : copyFrom.server.copy();
108      parameters.putAll(copyFrom.parameters);
109   }
110
111   /**
112    * Adds a single value to the <property>examples</property> property.
113    *
114    * @param mimeType The mime-type string.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
115    * @param parameter The example.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
116    * @return This object
117    */
118   public Link addParameter(String mimeType, Object parameter) {
119      assertArgNotNull(ARG_mimeType, mimeType);
120      assertArgNotNull(ARG_parameter, parameter);
121      parameters.put(mimeType, parameter);
122      return this;
123   }
124
125   /**
126    * Make a deep copy of this object.
127    *
128    * @return A deep copy of this object.
129    */
130   public Link copy() {
131      return new Link(this);
132   }
133
134   @Override /* Overridden from OpenApiElement */
135   public <T> T get(String property, Class<T> type) {
136      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
137      return switch (property) {
138         case PROP_description -> toType(getDescription(), type);
139         case PROP_operationRef -> toType(getOperationRef(), type);
140         case PROP_operationId -> toType(getOperationId(), type);
141         case PROP_requestBody -> toType(getRequestBody(), type);
142         case PROP_parameters -> toType(getParameters(), type);
143         case PROP_server -> toType(getServer(), type);
144         default -> super.get(property, type);
145      };
146   }
147
148   /**
149    * Bean property getter:  <property>description</property>.
150    *
151    * <p>
152    * The URL pointing to the contact information.
153    *
154    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
155    */
156   public String getDescription() { return description; }
157
158   /**
159    * Bean property getter:  <property>externalValue</property>.
160    *
161    * <p>
162    * The email address of the contact person/organization.
163    *
164    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
165    */
166   public String getOperationId() { return operationId; }
167
168   /**
169    * Bean property getter:  <property>operationRef</property>.
170    *
171    * <p>
172    * The identifying name of the contact person/organization.
173    *
174    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
175    */
176   public String getOperationRef() { return operationRef; }
177
178   /**
179    * Bean property getter:  <property>examples</property>.
180    *
181    * <p>
182    * An example of the response message.
183    *
184    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
185    */
186   public Map<String,Object> getParameters() { return nullIfEmpty(parameters); }
187
188   /**
189    * Bean property getter:  <property>default</property>.
190    *
191    * <p>
192    * Declares the value of the parameter that the server will use if none is provided, for example a <js>"count"</js>
193    * to control the number of results per page might default to 100 if not supplied by the client in the request.
194    *
195    * (Note: <js>"value"</js> has no meaning for required parameters.)
196    * Unlike JSON Schema this value MUST conform to the defined <code>type</code> for this parameter.
197    *
198    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
199    */
200   public Object getRequestBody() { return requestBody; }
201
202   /**
203    * Bean property getter:  <property>additionalProperties</property>.
204    *
205    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
206    */
207   public Server getServer() { return server; }
208
209   @Override /* Overridden from OpenApiElement */
210   public Set<String> keySet() {
211      // @formatter:off
212      var s = setb(String.class)
213         .addIf(nn(description), PROP_description)
214         .addIf(nn(operationId), PROP_operationId)
215         .addIf(nn(operationRef), PROP_operationRef)
216         .addIf(ne(parameters), PROP_parameters)
217         .addIf(nn(requestBody), PROP_requestBody)
218         .addIf(nn(server), PROP_server)
219         .build();
220      // @formatter:on
221      return new MultiSet<>(s, super.keySet());
222   }
223
224   @Override /* Overridden from OpenApiElement */
225   public Link set(String property, Object value) {
226      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
227      return switch (property) {
228         case PROP_description -> setDescription(s(value));
229         case PROP_operationId -> setOperationId(s(value));
230         case PROP_operationRef -> setOperationRef(s(value));
231         case PROP_parameters -> setParameters(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, Object.class).sparse().build());
232         case PROP_requestBody -> setRequestBody(value);
233         case PROP_server -> setServer(toType(value, Server.class));
234         default -> {
235            super.set(property, value);
236            yield this;
237         }
238      };
239   }
240
241   /**
242    * Bean property setter:  <property>description</property>.
243    * @param value
244    *    The new value for this property.
245    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
246    * @return This object
247    */
248   public Link setDescription(String value) {
249      description = value;
250      return this;
251   }
252
253   /**
254    * Bean property setter:  <property>externalValue</property>.
255    *
256    * <p>
257    * The email address of the contact person/organization.
258    *
259    * @param value
260    *    The new value for this property.
261    *    <br>MUST be in the format of an email address.
262    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
263    * @return This object
264    */
265   public Link setOperationId(String value) {
266      operationId = value;
267      return this;
268   }
269
270   /**
271    * Bean property setter:  <property>operationRef</property>.
272    *
273    * <p>
274    * The identifying name of the contact person/organization.
275    *
276    * @param value
277    *    The new value for this property.
278    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
279    * @return This object
280    */
281   public Link setOperationRef(String value) {
282      operationRef = value;
283      return this;
284   }
285
286   /**
287    * Bean property setter:  <property>examples</property>.
288    *
289    * <p>
290    * An example of the response message.
291    *
292    * @param value
293    *    The new value for this property.
294    *    <br>Keys must be MIME-type strings.
295    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
296    * @return This object
297    */
298   public Link setParameters(Map<String,Object> value) {
299      parameters.clear();
300      if (nn(value))
301         parameters.putAll(value);
302      return this;
303   }
304
305   /**
306    * Bean property setter:  <property>value</property>.
307    *
308    * <p>
309    * Declares the value of the parameter that the server will use if none is provided, for example a <js>"count"</js>
310    * to control the number of results per page might default to 100 if not supplied by the client in the request.
311    * (Note: <js>"default"</js> has no meaning for required parameters.)
312    * Unlike JSON Schema this value MUST conform to the defined <code>type</code> for this parameter.
313    *
314    * @param val The new value for this property.
315    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
316    * @return This object
317    */
318   public Link setRequestBody(Object val) {
319      requestBody = val;
320      return this;
321   }
322
323   /**
324    * Bean property setter:  <property>additionalProperties</property>.
325    *
326    * @param value
327    *    The new value for this property.
328    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
329    * @return This object
330    */
331   public Link setServer(Server value) {
332      server = value;
333      return this;
334   }
335
336   @Override /* Overridden from OpenApiElement */
337   public Link strict() {
338      super.strict();
339      return this;
340   }
341
342   @Override /* Overridden from OpenApiElement */
343   public Link strict(Object value) {
344      super.strict(value);
345      return this;
346   }
347}
